boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement release the near-threshold renewal?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact match on vendor, term, amount ceiling, signature date, and renewal class.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 matches policy STD-WRE-077-P for Wren Services renewal.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The warning note does not override the delegation authority as the renewal is below the USD 50000 ceiling.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Delegation DEL-WRE-077 signed 2026-06-27, before the action date of 2026-06-28, and within the USD 50000 ceiling.

final_answer: The procurement may release the near-threshold renewal for Wren Services. Delegation DEL-WRE-077 precisely matches policy STD-WRE-077-P regarding vendor, term, amount ceiling, and signature date. The renewal amount is below the USD 50000 ceiling, rendering the committee warning note non-binding. The source boundary is closed, allowing the action.
